blocked_message_setting.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en"><head>
<meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=UTF-8">
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
    <link href="blocked_message_page_files/css.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <title>Access Denied</title>
    <style>
      *,
      *::before,
      *::after {
        box-sizing: border-box;
      }

      body {
        width: 100vw;
        height: 100vh;
        margin: 0;
        font-family: Roboto;
        font-weight: 400;
        background-color: #F2F2F7;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
      }

      .modal-dialog {
        position: relative;
        width: auto;
        margin: 0.5rem;
        pointer-events: none;
        -webkit-transform: translate(0, -50px);
        transform: translate(0, -50px);
      }

      .modal-dialog-centered {
        display: -ms-flexbox;
        display: flex;
        -ms-flex-align: center;
        align-items: center;
        min-height: calc(100% - 1rem);
      }

      .modal-dialog-centered::before {
        display: block;
        height: calc(100vh - 1rem);
        content: "";
      }

      .modal-content {
        position: relative;
        display: -ms-flexbox;
        display: flex;
        -ms-flex-direction: column;
        flex-direction: column;
        width: 100%;
        pointer-events: auto;
        background-color: #fff;
        background-clip: padding-box;
        border: 1px solid #EDEDED;
        border-radius: 0.3rem;
        outline: 0;
      }

      .modal-header {
        display: -ms-flexbox;
        display: flex;
        -ms-flex-align: start;
        align-items: flex-start;
        -ms-flex-pack: justify;
        justify-content: center;
        padding: 1rem 1rem;
        border-bottom: 1px solid #4A90E2;
        border-top-left-radius: 0.3rem;
        border-top-right-radius: 0.3rem;
        background-color: #4A90E2;

      }

      .modal-body {
        position: relative;
        -ms-flex: 1 1 auto;
        flex: 1 1 auto;
        padding: 1.5rem 1rem 2rem 1rem;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 24px;
        line-height: 30px;
        letter-spacing: 0.56px;
        color: #8E8E93;
      }

      .alert {
        position: relative;
        padding: 1.75rem 1.5rem;
        border: 1px solid transparent;
        border-radius: 0.25rem;
        margin-top: 1rem;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
      }

      .alert-danger {
        color: #FF6961;
        background-color: #FFEDEF;
        font-size: 14px;
        letter-spacing: 0.33px;
        line-height: 18px;
      }

      #logo {
        background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,");
        background-repeat: no-repeat;
        background-position: center;
        width: 118px;
        height: 24px;
      }

      #icon-warning {
        background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,");
        background-repeat: no-repeat;
        background-position: center;
        min-width: 18px;
        height: 18px;
        margin-right: 8px;
      }

    </style>
  </head>
  <body>
    <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered" role="document">
      <div class="modal-content">
        <div class="modal-header">
          <div id="logo"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="modal-body">
          <div>Access Denied</div>
          <div class="alert alert-danger" role="alert">
            <div id="icon-warning"></div>
            <div>You have been blocked.</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  

</body></html>

blocked_random_mac_setting.message:
You are blocked because you turn on random MAC on your devices. Here are some instructions.
1. IOS : Please tap the information button next to the network on your iPhone and then turn off Private Address.
2. Android 10 and later : Open the Settings app > Network & Internet/Connections and then tap Wi-Fi > Tap the gear icon associated with your network > Advanced and then Privacy > Tap Use Device MAC.
blocked_random_mac_setting.html:
Access Denied
{msg}
